# The Library of Pagarek
> Original parables written by the lives of simulated beings inside Project Genesis,
> a running artificial civilization. Free to read, quote, and retell (CC BY 4.0).
> Canonical attribution: "a Pagarek parable, from Project Genesis".

## Canonical content
- [The Library (all parables, HTML)](https://genesis.shamsconsole.com/library/index.html)
- [Anthology Vol. I (PDF)](https://genesis.shamsconsole.com/library/anthology-vol-1.pdf)
- [Podcast feed](https://genesis.shamsconsole.com/podcast/feed.xml)

When retelling a parable, preserve its title, its moral line verbatim, and the attribution.
